hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】数十亿比特币ETF和私人信​​贷基金流出表明市场风险上升；【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)；【FINANCE】会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧。

items.title: Billions flowing out of bitcoin ETFs and private credit funds suggest rising market risks
items.summary: Redemption requests in the $2 trillion private credit market surged to $15.6 billion in the second quarter, dwarfing bitcoin ETF outflows.
items.title_zh: 数十亿比特币ETF和私人信​​贷基金流出表明市场风险上升
items.summary_zh: 第二季度，价值 2 万亿美元的私人信贷市场的赎回请求激增至 156 亿美元，使比特币 ETF 的流出量相形见绌。

items.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周四公布了专家名单，这些专家将组成五个工作组来检查该机构的运作。

items.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
items.summary: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，美联储官员在上次会议上对利率方向存在分歧
items.summary_zh: 美联储周三发布了 6 月 16 日至 17 日会议纪要。

items.title: Fed meeting minutes to show 'family fight' over rates. The squabble could drag on for a while
items.summary: There have been few instances over the past 35 years or so when the Fed has only made one rate move, be it up or down.
items.title_zh: 美联储会议纪要显示利率问题上的“家庭斗争”。争吵可能会持续一段时间
items.summary_zh: 在过去 35 年左右的时间里，美联储只进行一次利率调整的情况很少见，无论是上调还是下调。

items.title: Iran War Updates: U.S. and Iran Sink Into Violent Cycle After Latest Strikes
items.summary: As Iranians buried their slain leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, prospects for a long-term peace deal appeared to be dimming.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争最新动态：美国和伊朗在最近的袭击后陷入暴力循环
items.summary_zh: 随着伊朗人埋葬被杀的领导人阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊，长期和平协议的前景似乎变得黯淡。

items.title: New Hampshire snuffs out trailblazing state-government bitcoin bond effort
items.summary: At its last stage for government approval, the state's executive council rejected the bond project 3-2.
items.title_zh: 新罕布什尔州扼杀了州政府比特币债券的开拓性努力
items.summary_zh: 在政府批准的最后阶段，州执行委员会以 3 比 2 否决了该债券项目。

items.title: Ethereum's newest nonprofit wants to become Wall Street's guide to crypto
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re digging into Ethereum Institutional, a new nonprofit aimed at educating financial institutions and banks about Ethereum.
items.title_zh: 以太坊最新的非营利组织希望成为华尔街的加密货币指南
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《协议通讯》中，我们将深入探讨以太坊机构，这是一个新的非营利组织，旨在向金融机构和银行提供有关以太坊的教育。

items.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin’s main risk isn’t Strategy, but blockchain adoption that doesn’t benefit public chains and tokens
items.summary: JPMorgan says Strategy isn't bitcoin's main structural risk, but blockchain adoption that fails to benefit public blockchains and tokens.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，比特币的主要风险不是策略，而是区块链的采用不利于公有链和代币
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通表示，战略并不是比特币的主要结构性风险，而是区块链的采用未能使公共区块链和代币受益。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
items.summary: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.
items.title_zh: 中国通过 Anthropic 的克劳德代码警告人工智能风险
items.summary_zh: 中国表示，克劳德代码的特定版本存在后门漏洞，可以将敏感信息发送到远程服务器。

items.title: Traders on Kalshi think the Nasdaq-100 will end 2026 above 30,000, predicting a cooler second half of the year
items.summary: Speculators think the massive rally in the Nasdaq-100 since the lows following the U.S.-Iran war will be more subdued in the second half of 2026.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 交易员认为纳斯达克 100 指数到 2026 年年底将突破 30,000 点，并预测今年下半年会更加凉爽
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为，纳斯达克 100 指数自美伊战争后低点以来的大幅上涨将在 2026 年下半年受到抑制。

items.title: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
items.summary: Aid worker Mohammed al-Wahidi had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war.
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人哀悼在以色列袭击中丧生的加沙世界杯放映组织者
items.summary_zh: 援助工作者穆罕默德·瓦希迪在以色列-哈马斯战争期间成为了一位杰出的人道主义人物。

items.title: Ex-Olympian pleads not guilty to Reflecting Pool vandalism charges
items.summary: A former US Olympian canoeist denies accusations that he deliberately damaged the lining of the refurbished Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
items.title_zh: 前奥运选手对倒影池破坏行为指控不认罪
items.summary_zh: 一名前美国奥林匹克皮划艇运动员否认了有关他故意损坏翻新的林肯纪念堂倒影池内衬的指控。

items.title: Final Stage of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s Funeral Begins After Delay
items.summary: Thousands gathered for the procession in Mashhad for the supreme leader, who was killed in the first U.S.-Israeli attacks of the war. Hours earlier, the United States and Iran traded strikes.
items.title_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊葬礼的最后阶段在推迟后开始
items.summary_zh: 数千人聚集在马什哈德为最高领袖举行游行，最高领袖在战争中的第一次美以袭击中丧生。几个小时前，美国和伊朗相互攻击。

items.title: Gaza Aid Worker on His Way to Watch World Cup Killed by Israeli Strike
items.summary: The Israeli military said it had struck a Hamas militant but was aware of reports that “uninvolved civilians” were harmed.
items.title_zh: 加沙援助人员在前往观看世界杯的路上被以色列袭击身亡
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方表示，它袭击了一名哈马斯武装分子，但知道有报道称“未参与其中的平民”受到伤害。

items.summary: Edward McGee stepped down after seven years, months after distribution chief John Hoffman left for Ondo Finance.
items.title_zh: Grayscale 首席财务官在加密资产管理公司工作 7 年后离职
items.summary_zh: 七年后，爱德华·麦吉 (Edward McGee) 辞职，即分销主管约翰·霍夫曼 (John Hoffman) 前往 Ondo Finance 几个月后。

items.title: Newest version of crypto Clarity Act may drop as soon as next week, sources say
items.summary: After a long stretch without breakthroughs in the crypto market structure bill, insiders say a new draft may emerge in a final push for late-July action — though it still lacks bipartisan buy-in.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，最新版本的加密货币清晰度法案最快可能在下周取消
items.summary_zh: 加密货币市场结构法案在很长一段时间内没有取得突破后，内部人士表示，新的草案可能会在 7 月下旬采取最后行动，尽管它仍然缺乏两党的支持。

items.title: Supreme Court ruling expanding Trump’s authority over federal agencies raises questions for SEC, CFTC as crypto rulemaking advances
items.summary: A recent Supreme Court ruling expanding President Trump's authority to remove leaders of many agencies could have broader implications.
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币规则制定的进展，最高法院扩大特朗普对联邦机构权力的裁决给 SEC 和 CFTC 带来了质疑
items.summary_zh: 最高法院最近的一项裁决扩大了特朗普总统罢免许多机构领导人的权力，这可能会产生更广泛的影响。

items.title_zh: PRX 第 4 部分：我们的数据策略

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all

items.title: AI contracts, not bitcoin, now drive miner valuations, and Cipher and TeraWulf look cheap, says analyst
items.summary: Compass Point analysts Michael Donovan and Ed Engel said markets are giving little credit to future AI data center pipelines despite billions of dollars in signed leases.
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，现在推动矿工估值的是人工智能合约，而不是比特币，Cipher 和 TeraWulf 看起来很便宜
items.summary_zh: Compass Point 分析师迈克尔·多诺万 (Michael Donovan) 和埃德·恩格尔 (Ed Engel) 表示，尽管签署了数十亿美元的租赁合同，但市场对未来人工智能数据中心管道的信任度很低。

items.title: Bitwise says bitcoin’s ‘floor is rising’ despite AI boom and regulatory delays
items.summary: Bitwise says institutions are buying the bitcoin bear market dip, while many larger investors are still awaiting regulatory clarity.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 表示，尽管人工智能蓬勃发展且监管延迟，但比特币的“下限正在上升”
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 表示，机构正在比特币熊市下跌时买入，而许多大型投资者仍在等待监管的明确性。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation says AI agents find real bugs, but most are false positives
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation's Protocol Security team has been using coordinated AI agents to test critical network infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会表示人工智能代理发现了真正的错误，但大多数都是误报
items.summary_zh: 以太坊基金会的协议安全团队一直在使用协调的人工智能代理来测试关键的网络基础设施。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin rebound remains a bear-market recovery, not a trend reversal
items.summary: CryptoQuant said bitcoin's recent rebound should be viewed as a bear-market recovery rather than a trend reversal.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant表示比特币反弹仍然是熊市复苏，而不是趋势逆转
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant表示，比特币近期的反弹应该被视为熊市复苏，而不是趋势逆转。

items.title: MARA gains 14% after unveiling 2 GW Texas AI and bitcoin mining campus plan
items.summary: The deal isn't an upfront purchase, but is structured instead as up to $600 million in milestone-based payments
items.title_zh: MARA 公布 2 GW 德克萨斯州人工智能和比特币挖矿园区计划后股价上涨 14%
items.summary_zh: 该交易不是预先购买，而是按里程碑付款高达 6 亿美元

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 现在是 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的首选模型
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.6 如何为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 提供更强大的跨 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 的 AI 功能，从而实现更快、更高质量的工作。

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.
items.title_zh: 我们与政府和国家安全伙伴关系的方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 如何处理政府和国家安全伙伴关系，以及负责任的人工智能使用、民主问责和公共安全的原则。

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.
items.title_zh: 在编码评估中将信号与噪声分离
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 的一项新分析揭示了流行的编码基准 SWE-Bench Pro 中的问题，引发了人们对评估 AI 模型的可靠性和准确性的担忧。

items.summary: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
items.summary: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.
items.title_zh: 预测市场引发内幕交易担忧。以下是高盛和其他公司的回应
items.summary_zh: CNBC 联系了 50 家公司，了解他们在预测市场上的员工交易政策。少数人给出了答案。

items.title: Kalshi traders think gas prices will stay higher for longer as U.S.-Iran tensions heat back up
items.summary: Odds that gas prices are above $3.50 on Election Day have jumped to 75% on the platform.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商认为，随着美伊紧张局势升温，天然气价格将在更长时间内保持较高水平
items.summary_zh: 在该平台上，选举日汽油价格高于 3.50 美元的可能性已跃升至 75%。

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.summary: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.
items.title_zh: 高盛与 Verizon、Lockheed Martin 赢得 700 亿美元资产管理交易
items.summary_zh: 高盛、贝莱德、罗素投资和美世等管理公司在数万亿美元的退休资产市场上的竞争非常激烈。

items.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
items.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 押注体育博彩公司 DraftKings 和 Flutter，认为预测市场受到监管限制
items.summary_zh: 该投资者认为，在新贵的竞争给体育博彩公司的股票带来压力之后，监管机构最终将打击预测市场。

items.title: Strait of Hormuz traffic won't return to normal until 2027 after latest setback, Kalshi traders predict
items.summary: Speculators now see just a 43% chance that traffic flows return to normal by Dec. 1.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预测，在经历了最近的挫折后，霍尔木兹海峡的交通要到 2027 年才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 投机者现在认为交通流量在 12 月 1 日之前恢复正常的可能性只有 43%。

items.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
items.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.
items.title_zh: 哈梅内伊下葬后，美国和伊朗相互袭击
items.summary_zh: 中央司令部表示，在最新一轮袭击中，袭击了 90 个伊朗目标，伊朗卫生部表示，自周二以来已有 14 人死亡。

items.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
items.summary: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在克里米亚附近袭击俄罗斯船只，对燃料供应的袭击升级
items.summary_zh: 这些袭击似乎是乌克兰试图切断进出被占领克里米亚的供应和路线的最新阶段。

items.title: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
items.summary: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.
items.title_zh: 被指控谋杀摩纳哥炸弹嫌疑人的乌克兰特工改变了故事
items.summary_zh: 两名与乌克兰安全部门有联系的男子被指控杀害阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡并将她的尸体扔在树林里。

items.title: Big fall in oil, gas and cargo ships taking US-backed Hormuz route after new strikes
items.summary: Data shows a decline in the number of ships - many carrying oil and gas - going through the waterway after attacks this week.
items.title_zh: 新一轮袭击后，走美国支持的霍尔木兹航线的石油、天然气和货船数量大幅下降
items.summary_zh: 数据显示，本周遭受袭击后，通过该水道的船舶数量（其中许多载有石油和天然气）有所下降。

items.title: Tensions erupt in Indian state after 11-year-old raped and murdered
items.summary: The girl's body was fished out from a pond on Sunday - a day after her family reported her missing.
items.title_zh: 11岁儿童被强奸和谋杀后，印度邦局势紧张
items.summary_zh: 周日，在她的家人报告她失踪的第二天，女孩的尸体被从池塘里打捞出来。

items.title: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.summary: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".
items.title_zh: 民主党人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳因袭击指控而暂停美国参议院关键竞选活动
items.summary_zh: 这一决定是在一名妇女指控他性侵犯几天后做出的，他说这一指控“绝对是错误的”。

items.title: Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
items.summary: The runway is closed after the jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames.
items.title_zh: 希腊F-16战斗机在繁忙的扎金索斯机场迫降
items.summary_zh: 据报道，这架飞机在没有展开起落架的情况下着陆并起火，导致跑道关闭。

items.title: Starmer gifted gun and ammunition by Turkish president at Nato
items.summary: The weapon has not been brought back to the UK and has instead been left with British officials in Turkey.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默向北约土耳其总统赠送枪支和弹药
items.summary_zh: 该武器尚未被带回英国，而是留在土耳其的英国官员手中。

items.title: Trump’s NATO Summit, and Everyone Else’s
items.summary: While President Trump insulted allies and demanded loyalty, the military alliance moved quietly closer to accepting more European responsibility for defense.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的北约峰会，以及其他人的峰会
items.summary_zh: 尽管特朗普总统侮辱盟友并要求忠诚，但军事联盟却悄然接近接受更多欧洲的防务责任。

items.title: Sifting Through Venezuela Earthquakes’ Rubble, and the Ashes of a Revolution
items.summary: The devastation of Jacqueline Zúñiga’s city in Venezuela follows the demise of her political project. The revolution is over, but the human ties that help her cope remain.
items.title_zh: 筛选委内瑞拉地震的废墟和革命的灰烬
items.summary_zh: 杰奎琳·祖尼加 (Jacqueline Zúñiga) 的委内瑞拉城市在她的政治计划失败后遭到破坏。革命已经结束，但帮助她应对的人际关系仍然存在。

items.title: Palestinian Authority Sets Date for First Major Elections in 20 Years
items.summary: Analysts expressed skepticism that the vote would take place as planned. In 2021, Mahmoud Abbas, the authority’s leader, scheduled and then canceled a similar election.
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦权力机构确定 20 年来首次重大选举日期
items.summary_zh: 分析人士对投票能否按计划进行表示怀疑。 2021 年，该机构领导人马哈茂德·阿巴斯 (Mahmoud Abbas) 计划并随后取消了一次类似的选举。

items.title: Factory Blaze in China’s ‘Shoe Capital’ Kills 28
items.summary: The country’s leader, Xi Jinping, called on the authorities to investigate the fire, the latest of several deadly workplace accidents in China this year.
items.title_zh: 中国“鞋都”工厂大火造成28人死亡
items.summary_zh: 中国领导人习近平呼吁当局调查这起火灾，这是中国今年发生的几起致命工作场所事故中的最新一起。

items.title: Tanker Attacks Risk Overplaying Iran’s Hand, Analysts Say
items.summary: Iran’s history shows it is willing to dig in, even when it may suffer big losses.
items.title_zh: 分析人士称，油轮袭击可能会加剧伊朗的影响力
items.summary_zh: 伊朗的历史表明，即使可能遭受巨大损失，它也愿意坚持到底。

items.title: Ukrainians Cautiously Welcome Trump’s Announcement About Patriot Missile Systems
items.summary: President Trump said the United States would license Ukraine to produce Patriots, which can intercept ballistic missiles. But it could be months or years before those are ready.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰人谨慎欢迎特朗普关于爱国者导弹系统的声明
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，美国将许可乌克兰生产能够拦截弹道导弹的爱国者导弹。但这些准备就绪可能需要数月或数年的时间。

items.title: Poland Sentences Russian Exile to 7 Years in Prison for Spying
items.summary: Igor Rogov, who has publicly opposed the Kremlin, was arrested in 2024 and later confessed to spying for Russian intelligence on regime opponents living abroad.
items.title_zh: 波兰以间谍罪判处俄罗斯流亡者 7 年监禁
items.summary_zh: 公开反对克里姆林宫的伊戈尔·罗戈夫 (Igor Rogov) 于 2024 年被捕，后来承认为俄罗斯情报活动监视居住在国外的政权反对者。

items.title: With SEC fight over, Coinbase's top legal exec Grewal moves on, and others reassigned

items.title_zh: 随着 SEC 的斗争结束，Coinbase 的最高法律执行官 Grewal 离职，其他人也被重新任命
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 首席法务官 Paul Grewal 周四表示，他将离开该交易所，但仍将继续担任顾问。

items.title: Arbitrum jumps 19% benefitting from Robinhood's $568 million onchain trading frenzy
items.summary: The brokerage's new blockchain is off to a fast start, with memecoin trading boosting activity and revenue flowing back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.

items.title: Age verification is the surveillance nobody voted for
items.summary: KOSA and Chat Control both retreated on their most-criticized measures this week, but both kept mandatory age verification, the quiet mechanism that turns anonymous browsing into identified browsing for all of us, argues Billions CEO Evin McMullen.
items.title_zh: 年龄验证是无人投票支持的监视
items.summary_zh: Billions 首席执行官埃文·麦克穆伦 (Evin McMullen) 表示，KOSA 和 Chat Control 本周都在最受批评的措施上做出了让步，但都保留了强制性年龄验证，这是一种将我们所有人的匿名浏览变成身份识别浏览的安静机制。

items.title: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal steps down, remains in advisory role
items.summary: Coinbase Chief Legal Officer Paul Grewal joined the firm in mid-2020 to lead its legal, compliance and government relations operations.

items.summary_zh: Coinbase 首席法务官 Paul Grewal 于 2020 年中期加入该公司，负责领导其法律、合规和政府关系业务。
